bullets: APK Inspect — peek inside any release before installing.
Dhizuku silent install — bypass OEM install prompts on Xiaomi, OPPO, vivo, Huawei devices via Device Owner.
Obtainium import/export — bring your library over from Obtainium with one tap, or export to Obtainium any time.
Add from starred — surface APK-shipping repos from your GitHub stars.
Open-issues count and license now shown to everyone, including signed-out users — sourced from the backend, no GitHub quota cost.
Background update check can be turned off entirely — saves battery if you'd rather check for updates manually.
Liquid Glass effect removed — icons in dark mode could become invisible against transparent backgrounds. Cleaner, higher-contrast UI everywhere.
